## Repository type

What kind of project did you run readme-ai on?

## Command

```bash
readme-ai generate ...
```

## Problem with output

What was missing, wrong, or confusing?

## Expected output

Describe what a better README should include.

## Safe sample

If possible, paste a small sanitized example repo structure.
